name: wiki-mirror
description: Local Markdown-disk mirror for a (possibly remote) wiki-server. A headless, schema-agnostic stream client: tails a workspace's Durable Stream, folds + renders each commit with the `wiki` engine, and writes the deterministic Markdown to a local checkout. The disk-writing sibling of wiki-ui; imports `wiki` + `wiki-models` only, never wiki-mcp/wiki-server.
